parameters.query: query RulesByPhase($phaseId: ID!, $first: Int!, $after: String) { phase(id: $phaseId) { id cards(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id title fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } } }
